name: chain__if_youre_making_less_than_10kmonth_
method: if you're making less than $10k/month & you're obsessed with "building" products, then you've got your priorities completely backwards...there's thousands of products out there that have already prov

stages.task: Scrape affiliate network leaderboards (ClickBank gravity, ShareASale EPC, Impact top programs) for products in faith/fitness/tech/productivity niches with EPC > $1 and gravity > 20
Score candidates by: niche fit (do we have audience?), commission rate, cookie duration, existing competition on our sites, free trial availability. Filter to top 5 per niche
Generate comparison landing pages (X vs Y format) and 5 social posts per product using engagement_bait_converter.py patterns
Deploy pages to surge, queue social content, inject affiliate links into relevant existing app landing pages (sidebar/footer CTA)
